pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts confirm the download location and expected path for the input file
export_result.sh and verifier.py scripts explicitly check for the DIMAP file at this path
export_result.sh and verifier.py scripts explicitly check for the GeoTIFF file at this path
verifier.py strictly enforces dim_band_count == 3 for the subset validation scoring

privileged_info_summary: The input data is a real Landsat multispectral raster image (4 bands) downloaded from the opengeos GitHub repository. The task scripts strictly expect the final subsetted DIMAP and GeoTIFF files to be exported to /home/ga/snap_exports/enhanced_coastal.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/enhanced_coastal.tif, respectively. The verifier enforces that the final exported product contains exactly 3 gamma-enhanced bands.
